articles.title: APPLE LAUNCHES A NEW M3-POWERED IPAD AIR
articles.summary: Apple has announced a new iPad Air with an M3 chip that offers a performance boost over previous models, though it's not using Apple's latest M4 processor. It also gets an improved Magic Keyboard, making it feel more like a Pro-level device. Apple still faces the ongoing question of what the iPad is truly for, as the upgrades mainly appeal to those with much older models.

articles.title: COREL JUST STEALTH LAUNCHED ITS MOST EXCITING APP IN YEARS
articles.summary: Alludo, formerly Corel, has launched CorelDRAW Go, a browser-based graphic design app for beginners and enthusiasts. CorelDRAW Go offers customizable templates, interactive drawing tools, and over six million stock images. Positioned between Canva and professional software, CorelDRAW Graphics Suite also adds a web version and new features.

articles.title: NEW PENTAGRAM BOOK FEATURES 1,000 LOGOS ITS PARTNERS DESIGNED
articles.summary: Pentagram's 1,000 Marks book expands its 2010 edition, now featuring 1,000 logos spanning diverse styles and industries. Curated through a democratic process led by Angus Hyland, it highlights both iconic and lesser-known identities. Designed for a digital-first world, the book is available in three editions, including one with an A2 fold-out poster.

articles.title: HOW TO TEST AND MEASURE CONTENT IN UX
articles.summary: To check if content is clear, use Banana Testing by replacing actions with “Banana” to see if users understand them, or Content Heatmapping where users highlight what makes sense or feels confusing. Moderated testing helps find deeper issues, while methods like Cloze tests and card sorting fine-tune wording. The right words matter because one unclear page can ruin the whole experience.

articles.title: MAKING DESIGNS WITHOUT A DESIGNER
articles.summary: AI-driven tools like v0.dev make designing sleek, responsive UIs easier than ever—no coding needed. Users describe their needs with prompts and get functional interfaces in seconds. This speeds up development while ensuring consistency, though AI-generated layouts can feel stiff or standardized. Still, for quick prototyping, these tools are a game-changer

articles.title: INSIDE THE GREAT EGG BRANDING CRISIS
articles.summary: Egg prices have soared, challenging consumer loyalty to premium brands. Matt Sia, once passionate about premium eggs, now prioritizes affordability. The American Egg Board has shifted messaging toward frugality, while shortages boost Just Egg's alternative. Consumers prioritize price over branding, reshaping the egg market and signaling a shift in purchasing habits.

articles.title: HALFTONE EFFECT GENERATOR
articles.summary: This web-based halftone effect generator transforms images and videos into artistic dot patterns.

articles.title: EVERART
articles.summary: Use AI to create on-brand content trained on any product, style, or mood board.

articles.title: NOTIFICATION PSYCHOLOGY LAB
articles.summary: This game will help you understand the techniques that make notifications impossible to ignore.

articles.title: AI TRANSPARENCY IN UX: DESIGNING CLEAR AI INTERACTIONS
articles.summary: When AI shapes digital experiences, users should know what's happening. Design systems like GitLab's Pajamas and IBM's Carbon make AI content clear, while Twilio's Paste takes a subtler approach. However, not all solutions work—some AI-enhanced interfaces hinder low-vision users. True transparency isn't just labeling AI - it's ensuring everyone can navigate it easily.

articles.title: WHY MOST PRODUCTS TODAY ARE MEH
articles.summary: Many modern products feel generic due to an overemphasis on short-term metrics and a lack of user-centered design. To improve, designers should understand user needs, challenge ineffective design choices, and prioritize long-term engagement over optimization traps.

articles.title: BLINKINK USES THE SUBTLE IMPERFECTIONS OF CROSS STITCH TO CRAFT AN ANIMATED CAMPAIGN FOR BURBERRY
articles.summary: Blinkink partnered with Burberry to create four animated shorts for the Winter 2025 show, bringing the knight logo to life through cross-stitch animation. Expertly crafted over four weeks, the campaign blends traditional embroidery with modern sound design by John Malcolm Morre and Charlie Pelling.

articles.title: THE ART OF ALIEN FILM SERIES – HOW A FEARFUL FUTURE WAS CRAFTED
articles.summary: The visual heritage of the Alien film series stems from H.R. Giger's artwork and the designs of Ron Cobb and Chris Foss.

articles.title: THIS ARTIST COMBINES HYPER-REALISM WITH DOODLES
articles.summary: Miracle Lim, a South Korean art director, mesmerizes over 224,000 Instagram followers with hyper-realistic illustrations, blending intricate details with expressive doodles that reveal her creative process in captivating step-by-step breakdowns.

articles.title: WHY ICON-ONLY DESIGN IS FAILING USERS: THE CASE FOR TEXT LABELS
articles.summary: Users struggle to interpret meanings when icons lack text labels, increasing their cognitive load.
